title: gomphocentrum cornucopiae
intro: Gomphocentrum cornucopiae, also known as the Cornucopia, is a flowering plant species in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gomphocentrum cornucopiae include relief from coughs, colds, and fever, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Gomphocentrum cornucopiae include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, syrups, and salves for topical application.
